summary: F2b testing completed: Backend 100% pass (18/18 tests), Frontend login issue prevents UI testing. All F2b backend features (Pending SO, ATP future-aware, delivery hold) working correctly via API. F2 regression and RBAC tests also passing.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin quick login button click does not navigate to dashboard - page remains on login screen after clicking Admin button
ui_bugs.impact: Blocks all frontend testing - cannot access any views after login

passed_tests: F2b: GET /api/stock/pending-so returns SO-0009 with Batik Mega Mendung Premium, backorder_qty=200, coverage='covered', promise_date set, incoming_total=800

F2b: GET /api/stock/atp for prod_batik_mega returns correct ATP detail with PO-00009 (qty=800), SO-0009 in pending demand (qty=200), arithmetic validation passed (atp_horizon = available + incoming_in_horizon - pending_total)
F2b: POST /api/stock/hold with delivery hold_type creates hold successfully, appears in GET /api/stock/holds with hold_type='delivery', release successful
F2 Regression: GET /api/stock/buckets returns product bucket board with 7 products and all required bucket fields
F2 Regression: POST /api/stock/hold (general) creates hold successfully
F2 Regression: POST /api/stock/wip/start creates WIP successfully
F2 Regression: POST /api/stock/wip/{wip_id}/complete completes WIP successfully
F2 Regression: POST /api/stock/hold/{hold_id}/release releases hold successfully
RBAC: warehouse@kainnusantara.id CAN POST /api/stock/hold (inventory.update permission working)
RBAC: sales@kainnusantara.id gets 403 on POST /api/stock/hold (correctly denied)
RBAC: sales@kainnusantara.id gets 403 on POST /api/stock/wip/start (correctly denied)
INV-4/INV-5: WITHOUT X-Entity-Id header - consistency check passed (list_count=7, total_orders=7, active_orders=6)
INV-4/INV-5: WITH X-Entity-Id: all header - consistency check passed (list_count=9, total_orders=9, active_orders=8)
Backend authentication working correctly (login returns token, token-based auth working)
All backend endpoints responding with correct status codes and data structures

critical: Fix frontend login flow: Admin quick login button click does not navigate to dashboard. After clicking 'Admin' button on login screen, page remains on login screen instead of navigating to admin dashboard. This blocks all frontend testing.
action_item_for_main_agent.notes: All F2b backend features are fully functional and tested. Once login issue is fixed, frontend UI testing can proceed. Backend test file created at /app/test_f2b_backend.py for future regression testing.
